_comment: Experiment: the SAME big village spread across 3 smaller islands arranged in a RING around the pop point, with the centre left VOID — the village's central square sits on a small pad over that void hole and spans the ring on its own bridges/piers. Each small island is shallow (no deep teardrop). Compare with village_center (one huge island). cluster_offsets = a triangle ~19 out from the centre; there is NO island at the centre.
